title: Complex business decision board
summary: A richer launch review board with multiple options, mixed evidence, blocker risks, questions, assumptions, and actions.

nodes.text: Should we launch the AI meeting assistant beta to external customers in June?
nodes.content: Should we launch the AI meeting assistant beta to external customers in June?

nodes.text: Launch only to internal teams in June
nodes.content: Launch only to internal teams in June

nodes.text: Run a limited beta with five design-partner customers
nodes.content: Run a limited beta with five design-partner customers

nodes.text: Delay launch until the security review and export controls are complete
nodes.content: Delay launch until the security review and export controls are complete

nodes.text: The core transcription and action-item pipeline already meets internal reliability targets.
nodes.content: The core transcription and action-item pipeline already meets internal reliability targets.

nodes.text: Three design-partner customers said they would test the product if action summaries and admin controls are ready.
nodes.content: Three design-partner customers said they would test the product if action summaries and admin controls are ready.

nodes.text: An internal cost estimate shows that delaying to August would add two months of contractor expense.
nodes.content: An internal cost estimate shows that delaying to August would add two months of contractor expense.

nodes.text: The security review is still incomplete, which creates a launch blocker for external customer access.
nodes.content: The security review is still incomplete, which creates a launch blocker for external customer access.

nodes.text: Admins may reject the product if retention settings and meeting export controls are unclear.
nodes.content: Admins may reject the product if retention settings and meeting export controls are unclear.

nodes.text: Internal usage in June will surface most of the highest-risk failure modes before customer rollout.
nodes.content: Internal usage in June will surface most of the highest-risk failure modes before customer rollout.

nodes.text: Can the security team complete the review before the final June launch gate?
nodes.content: Can the security team complete the review before the final June launch gate?

nodes.text: Do we need customer-facing export controls in the first beta or only before general release?
nodes.content: Do we need customer-facing export controls in the first beta or only before general release?

nodes.text: Confirm the security review timeline with the security lead.
nodes.content: Confirm the security review timeline with the security lead.

nodes.text: Draft admin-facing retention and export-control settings for the beta workspace.
nodes.content: Draft admin-facing retention and export-control settings for the beta workspace.

nodes.text: Prepare an internal-only launch checklist for June dogfooding.
nodes.content: Prepare an internal-only launch checklist for June dogfooding.
